name: Wix
tagline: AI website builder that generates a complete, customisable site from a few questions

match_reasons.coding-building: AI generates a full website — pages, navigation, contact forms, and SEO setup — from a few onboarding questions
match_reasons.low_technical: The fastest path from zero to a live site — answer questions and get a publishable website in under five minutes

name: Framer
tagline: AI-powered design and website builder with Figma-like flexibility and polished output

match_reasons.coding-building: AI generates polished website layouts with strong visual hierarchy and typography — the best design quality of any AI builder
match_reasons.images-video: Design-first builder with hover effects, scroll animations, and responsive breakpoints built into the AI output
match_reasons.low_technical: Describe your site in a sentence and get a three-page design in 90 seconds — fully editable with no template constraints

name: Semrush
tagline: All-in-one SEO and content marketing platform with AI-powered auditing and keyword strategy

match_reasons.research-knowledge: AI-powered site audit, keyword research, competitive analysis, and content gap identification in a single platform
match_reasons.writing-content: Keyword Strategy Builder uses AI to turn a seed keyword into a full topical map with pillar pages and supporting articles
match_reasons.low_technical: Beginner-friendly site health scoring and plain-language fix suggestions — the most accessible all-in-one SEO platform

name: Granola
tagline: AI meeting notes app that enriches your rough notes with full meeting context automatically

match_reasons.research-knowledge: Listens to your meetings and enriches your rough notes with full context — combines what you wrote with what was said
match_reasons.workflow-automation: Automatic meeting transcription with AI-generated summaries, action items, and structured notes
match_reasons.low_technical: Just take notes like normal during the meeting — Granola fills in the gaps automatically afterward

name: Loom
tagline: Async video messaging platform with AI-powered summaries, chapters, and task extraction

match_reasons.workflow-automation: AI generates video summaries, chapters, and action items so viewers can skip to what matters
match_reasons.images-video: Record screen and camera walkthroughs with automatic transcription, filler word removal, and editing
match_reasons.low_technical: Click record, explain anything visually, and share a link — viewers get an AI summary without watching the whole thing
